Container.Name: roguemeso
Container.Overview: RogueMeso — self-hosted hypertrophy training app. On first start it waits for the database, applies Prisma migrations to build the schema, and seeds the exercise + program-template library (only if the DB is empty), then serves the web app on port 3000. No user accounts are seeded — register your own and start a fresh mesocycle with the full exercise library available. Requires the roguemeso-db container.
Container.Description: RogueMeso app. Private image — the server needs a one-time `docker login ghcr.io` before pulling. Set DATABASE_URL to point at the roguemeso-db container (same user/password/db) and AUTH_SECRET to a 32+ char random string.

Config.Name: WebUI port
Config.Description: App HTTP port. On br0 reach the app at this IP:3000.

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: Postgres connection string. Replace CHANGE_ME with POSTGRES_PASSWORD and the IP with the roguemeso-db container's IP. Keep ?schema=public.

Config.Name: AUTH_SECRET
Config.Description: Session signing secret, 32+ chars. Generate: openssl rand -base64 48
